title: Bubble Mania Carry Along Bubble Machine For Kids - Automatic Bubble Maker With Handle - For Indoor and Outdoor Use - Portable Bubble Blower For Kids
features: INSTANT BUBBLES FOR KIDS - Create tons of bubbles with this 'simple to use' battery operated bubble machine. Includes a carry handle so kids can take there bubbling fun everywhere!
VERY EASY TO USE - Perfect for young children, simply add bubble solution and press the jumbo button on the top. The air will be filled with hundreds of bubbles for kids, in a matter of seconds.
SPEND LESS TIME FILLING IT UP - Bubble maker designed with an extra large bubble reservoir which means less time filling it up, and more time catching bubbles!
INCLUDES FREE BUBBLE TUB - With a jumbo 8 fl oz bubble solution tub you can get making bubbles right away. Compatible with all other bubble solutions.

STRONG, SAFE & FUN - Built to last, it's strong, sturdy and ready to take knocks, but with it's vibrant colours and cool shape, it's engaging for kids. Fully compliant with all UK + EU toy safety standards.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 High Performance Bubbles! 2 Extra Large Reservoir! 3 100% Non-Toxic Bubble Previous page Next page 1 Pour 2 Press 3 Enjoy! Previous page Next page 1 Make Your Bubble Solution 2 Make Thousands of Bubbles 3 100% Fun and Safe Education Objective(s) Literacy & Spatial Awareness: Our Carry Along Bubble Machine is more than just fun! It sparks little imaginations for storytelling and helps kids understand space as they chase and pop bubbles. Perfect for playful learning! Care Instructions Easy peasy! Just give your Carry Along Bubble Machine a quick wipe with a dry cloth to keep it clean. Remember, keep it dry around the battery area to keep the bubble magic going! Material Types: We've used 100% non-toxic, super safe plastic. So, while the kids are having a blast with bubbles, you can relax knowing they're playing safe. What is the fill capacity? With a fill capacity of 8 fl oz, your Carry Along Bubble Machine will keep the bubble party going for ages! Just fill it up and watch the endless stream of bubbly fun! Can I buy more liquid? While we don't sell bubble liquid, no worries! You can easily find other bubble solutions in stores. Plus, we've got a cool DIY bubble recipe just above this section – super easy and loads of fun to make with the kids!
